description_long: This is a modern, stylized rifle with a predominantly black and red color scheme, featuring a long, integrally suppressed barrel. The body of the rifle is angular and robust, with metallic and polymer components, and a red-accented pistol grip and trigger guard. The top of the rifle is equipped with a compact red dot sight, and the magazine appears to be a detachable box type, with a single cartridge visible below the receiver. The suppressor is seamlessly integrated with the barrel, giving the weapon a sleek, tactical appearance. The grip and butt area are ergonomically designed, with red highlights for visual contrast. The overall design suggests a high-tech, urban tactical firearm suitable for covert or specialized operations.
description: A sleek, black and red modern rifle with an integrally suppressed barrel, red dot sight, and ergonomic pistol grip. Features a detachable box magazine and a tactical, high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, integrally suppressed barrel, red dot sight, and a visible cartridge below the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile, sight alignment, and the red accents on the grip and suppressor.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the grip, trigger, and magazine area.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular end of the suppressor, the alignment of the sight, and the compact width of the rifle.
